opportunity.title: Show HN: Soros – AI for geopolitical macro investing
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: Building reliable agents for this domain requires solving data provenance problems—geopolitical events lack the structured feature engineering that makes financial AI work. You'll also want to decouple your reasoning loop from execution; have the agent produce trade recommendations that go through a separate risk/position-sizing layer before any capital moves.
actions.reasoning: I have hands-on experience building multi-provider LLM routing systems and tool orchestration for high-stakes decision domains, which directly relates to the technical challenges of AI for geopolitical/macro investing.
